raw: {"perspective": "Legal Advisor", "findings": [{"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "GDPR Article 22 consent flow", "issue": "Insufficient consent flow for automated decision-making", "recommended_fix": "Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making as per GDPR Article 22"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "AZ Personal Data Protection Act", "issue": "Potential non-compliance for Baku launch", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements and ensure compliance"}, {"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "Platform liability", "issue": "Unclear legal exposure if AURA score is used for hiring decisions", "recommended_fix": "Establish clear guidelines and disclaimers for AURA score usage in hiring decisions"}, {"severity": "BLOCK", "file_or_area": "Data processor agreements", "issue": "DPAs not in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway", "recommended_fix": "Establish DPAs with Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway as required by GDPR"}, {"severity": "WARN", "file_or_area": "Terms of Service", "issue": "Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments", "recommended_fix": "Review and update ToS to explicitly cover AI-generated assessments"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": null, "next_files_to_read": ["supabase/migrations/", "apps/api/app/routers/assessment.py"]}

findings.issue: Insufficient consent flow for automated decision-making
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decision-making as per GDPR Article 22
Conduct thorough review of AZ Personal Data Protection Act requirements and ensure compliance

findings.issue: Unclear legal exposure if AURA score is used for hiring decisions
findings.recommended_fix: Establish clear guidelines and disclaimers for AURA score usage in hiring decisions

findings.issue: DPAs not in place for Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway
findings.recommended_fix: Establish DPAs with Supabase, Google Cloud, Railway as required by GDPR

findings.issue: Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments
findings.recommended_fix: Review and update ToS to explicitly cover AI-generated assessments
